description: STATUS:Full Time, 1 FTE* School Title I Teacher on Special Assignments include a temporary/at-will contract for 10 extra contract days.EDUCATION and/or EXPERIENCE(for detailed information, please see the attached job description)Current WCSD employee with a minimum of a Bachelor's Degree and a minimum of 3 years of successful teaching experience in an elementary school.CERTIFICATES, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONSMust have an active professional level Utah Teaching License and an active Utah School Lead...
